description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build, test, report, package-tar, package-docker, package-src, package-bin, package-test, package-bundle, and package-upload. In the build stage, the build:linux job uses the debian:bookworm image and runs apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq --no-install-recommends build-essential clang cmake, then installs libboost-filesystem-dev libfftw3-dev libliquid-dev libyaml-cpp-dev, libairspy-dev libasound-dev gnuradio-dev gr-osmosdr libhackrf-dev liblimesuite-dev libpulse-dev librtlsdr-dev, libgd-dev, libcurl4-openssl-dev libssh-dev, creates a build directory, cd build, runs cmake -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=. -DWITH_INPUT_AIRSPY=ON -DWITH_INPUT_GROSMOSDR=ON -DWITH_INPUT_LIMESDR=ON .., then make -j 4 and make -j 4 install, publishing the compiled binaries as artifacts. The test stage includes unittests (needs build:linux, installs runtime libs, configures pulseaudio, starts pulseaudio, creates and chowns test/ftpdir, runs ./build/src/qrsspig_test and ./build/bin/qrsspig --listmodules --listdevices with an ftp service), unittests:cppcheck (runs cppcheck --quiet --force --enable=all --suppressions-list=cppcheck.supp --xml --xml-version=2 --error-exitcode=42 src 2> cppcheck.xml), and unittests:valgrind (installs valgrind and runs valgrind --leak-check=full --error-exitcode=42 --xml=yes --xml-file=valgrind1.xml ./build/src/qrsspig_test and valgrind --leak-check=full --error-exitcode=42 --suppressions=valgrind.supp --gen-suppressions=all --xml=yes --xml-file=valgrind2.xml ./build/bin/qrsspig --listmodules --listdevices). The report stage runs report:cppcheck using the neszt/cppcheck-docker:2.10 image, installs python3 py3-pygments, creates reports/cppcheck/, and generates an HTML report with cppcheck-htmlreport --file=cppcheck.xml --report-dir=reports/cppcheck/ --source-dir=., storing the report as an artifact. The packaging stages use docker:23.0.1-git with docker:23.0.1-dind service: package:tar creates source tarballs, package:src runs a parallel matrix over DIST values to build source packages inside a container, package:bin runs a parallel matrix over HARDWARE/IMAGE combos to build binary packages, package:docker builds multi‑arch Docker images with docker buildx (pulls tonistiigi/binfmt, installs qemu, sets DIST, ARCH, PLATFORM, logs in, pulls caches, builds and pushes tags), package:test runs the built binaries in parallel matrix containers for testing, package:bundle creates a tar.xz bundle of the .deb files, and package:upload (only on master) installs openssh-client, starts ssh-agent, adds $SSH_PRIVATE_KEY, and scp's the bundle to gitlab@debian.hb9fxx.ch:incoming/. All jobs define appropriate artifact paths, expirations, and are limited to staging or master branches as specified.
